---
name: Feature or Content Proposal
about: Suggest a new technical project or content addition for the portfolio.
title: "[PROPOSAL]: "
labels: enhancement, discussion
assignees: Archit-Konde
---

**Proposed Enrichment**
A clear description of the project or article being proposed.

**Technical Rationale**
Why should this project be included in the portfolio? What research value does it provide?

**Implementation Strategy**
A high-level outline of the proposed architecture or content structure.

**Metadata Requirements**
Identify new keywords or citations that will be added to the project metadata.
